collections.label: Siti Essentials
collections.description: Recognised songs spanning the defining colours of Siti's catalogue.
collections.semanticDescription: Recognised Siti Nurhaliza classics, signature songs and accessible starting points across eras.

collections.label: Romantic Siti
collections.description: Tender, sweeping and warmly expressive love songs.
collections.semanticDescription: Romantic warmth, graceful love songs, date-night listening and emotionally expressive ballads.

collections.label: Traditional and Nusantara
collections.description: Traditional forms, regional colours and rhythm-led repertoire.
collections.semanticDescription: Malay traditional, ethnic creative, Nusantara, folk-rooted and rhythm-led repertoire.

collections.label: Elegant Evenings
collections.description: Polished, poised music for an unhurried evening.
collections.semanticDescription: Elegant and polished evening listening with graceful vocals, calm atmosphere and refined arrangements.

collections.label: Powerful Vocals
collections.description: Commanding performances with dramatic or confident lift.
collections.semanticDescription: Powerful vocal performances, emotional crescendos, dramatic intensity and confident presence.

collections.label: Comfort and Calm
collections.description: Gentle choices that settle the room without fading away.
collections.semanticDescription: Calm, comforting, peaceful and reflective songs with gentle but awake energy.

collections.label: Joyful and Upbeat
collections.description: Bright, lively choices for movement and good company.
collections.semanticDescription: Happy, cheerful, upbeat, lively and energetic music for cooking, driving and celebration.

collections.label: Nostalgic Classics
collections.description: Familiar signals from the early and signature eras.
collections.semanticDescription: Nostalgic Siti classics, familiar favourites and songs associated with earlier catalogue eras.

collections.label: Modern Siti
collections.semanticDescription: Modern and recent Siti Nurhaliza releases with contemporary pop production and current collaborations.

collections.label: Duets and Collaborations
collections.description: Shared performances with clearly credited musical partners.
collections.semanticDescription: Duets, featured artists and collaborative recordings led by or prominently featuring Siti Nurhaliza.

collections.label: Festive Frequency
collections.description: Selected celebratory and Hari Raya repertoire.
collections.semanticDescription: Festive, celebratory and Hari Raya music with joyful communal energy.

collections.label: Hidden Gems
collections.description: Deeper catalogue choices for discovery without losing quality.
collections.semanticDescription: Less familiar deep cuts and discovery choices from across Siti Nurhaliza's verified catalogue.

collections.label: Malaysian Legends
collections.description: An optional future collection for separately verified Malaysian artists.
collections.semanticDescription: Disabled secondary collection reserved for verified Malaysian artists beyond the primary Siti station.
